data.body: Ported in 8b4baf1b: _commands/unlink.py with the net-effective replay (LINK/UNLINK + SNAPSHOT fallback) + reciprocal-for-relates_to + orphan warning; UNLINK via seam; active-link guard reuses rebar.graph._is_active_link. Dual-run green bash AND python (link+unlink both python) on link (66), duplicates-supersedes (23), discovered-from (4) + library parity tests. Default stays bash.
